# Commercial Mortgages Cambridge
> Specialist commercial mortgage broker for Cambridge, the Greater Cambridge life sciences cluster, and Cambridgeshire. Owner-occupier, investment, semi-commercial, portfolio and trading-business commercial mortgages from a 90+ lender panel including Cambridge & Counties Bank, Shawbrook, InterBay Commercial, LendInvest, Cynergy Bank, Lloyds, NatWest, Barclays and Santander. Indicative terms in 48 hours, completion typically 4 to 8 weeks.

## Content Hierarchy
- /: Homepage with Cambridge market snapshot, live planning pipeline, calculator, lender panel, area grid, case studies, testimonials, FAQ
- /services/: Commercial mortgage product hub
- /property-types/: Coverage by sector
- /areas/: Cambridge sub-areas with commercial planning and market data
- /calculator/: Commercial mortgage repayment and LTV calculator
- /blog/: Market commentary and rate insights
- /case-studies/: Anonymised real deals
- /about/: Broker bio and credentials
- /how-it-works/: 5-step process
- /contact/: Enquiry form
- /faq/: Frequently asked questions

## Key Facts
- Service: Commercial mortgages
- Coverage: Cambridge and Cambridgeshire (Greater Cambridge plus South Cambridgeshire fringe sites)
- Facility size: £150K to £10M
- Term: 5 to 25 years
- LTV: typically 65 to 75% (semi-commercial up to 75%, trading-business 60 to 70%, lab and life sciences investment 60 to 70%)
- Rates (mid-2026): 6.0 to 9.0% pa
- Lender panel: 90+ lenders
- Decision time: indicative terms in 48 hours
- Named lenders: Shawbrook, InterBay Commercial, LendInvest, Cynergy Bank, Lloyds, NatWest, Barclays, Santander, plus 80+ others including Cambridge & Counties Bank

## Data
Each area page contains live local market data:
- Land Registry sold-data signal (residential transaction volume as market temperature)
- Live commercial planning pipeline from Greater Cambridge Shared Planning (Cambridge City Council and South Cambridgeshire DC)
- Named life sciences clusters (Cambridge Biomedical Campus, Cambridge Science Park, Granta Park, Babraham Research Campus, St John's Innovation Park)
- Lender appetite by sector
